info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: ' divAdeH kupyati kroDe BAzAyAM kopayetkupeH ' (Slo. 136) iti devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: prakftiprakopaH prajAnAM rAjavidroho Bavati vAtapittAdiprakopo vAtAdeH SarIrasTasyAwopo Bavati
'mahAjanA droRAcAryyAdayaH brahmakarmAdare surakAryaM na syAd anAdare SizwAcAravyAkopa iti BAvaH' (BA0 SAM0 26017 ityatra nIlakaRWaH) vyAkopo viroDaH
'utkrAntigatyAgatiSrutivyAkopaH syAt' (bra0 sU0 SAM0 BA0 247) vyAkopo viroDaH
'tena cEvAtikopena sa yajYaH sanDitastadA' (BA0 droRa0 20263) atikopo'tItakopaH SAntasaMramBaH
'sudarSanaM parikupitaM niSamya te' (BA0 Adi0 1929) parikupitam atikupitam
